title: 46h GENERAL
wikitext:
[]: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Mon Jan 16, 2023 9:23 am I think it's safe to assume that -46h is worth its own thread. The hype is real and we'll have a lot to discuss in the coming months. Let's leave the Blu-ray topic for those who are waiting for it to come out and want to answer more technical questions. The discussion you guys were having there was a good one, so I'm going to keep that thread intact. Any further debates about -46h go here.

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by nerv bae » Mon Jan 16, 2023 9:40 am i hereby dedicate first reply to blindfolded best girl

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by The_Max » Mon Jan 16, 2023 2:43 pm We have a very curious way of saying goodbye to evangelion. And that includes Anno himself PS: 46h will do pretty much the same as all other evangelion chapters/movies... for each question answered two new questions are created

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by Jinroh » Mon Jan 16, 2023 2:48 pm It's probably going to be a glorified clip with barely, if any dialogue. Maybe to gauge the fandom interest in a potential movie/manga/whatever else covering the time skip events?

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Mon Jan 16, 2023 2:51 pm I'm guessing it will follow precedent and cram as much information as possible as can be done using psychedelic quick-cuts, something similar to the OG OP sequence or Asuka's Shin instrumentality.

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Jan 16, 2023 4:37 pm That eyewear (which gives me Neo in the 3rd Matrix film vibes) has got to be some sort of prototype equipment to keep Rebuild!Bardiel at bay until they put that mini-pillar that pops out in 3.0+1.0 into Asuka's eye. Which i doubt will be a painless process. I'm thinking something along the lines of that scene from Dead Space 2. The glyphs on there don't seem to be the same Angel-Sealing Hex Glyphs we've been seeing since 2.0 but I'm guessing they serve the same purpose. Youve got to wonder what Unit she is in if this is a flashback to just after the end of 2.0. Unit 01 is in god mode, Unit 02 is in bits, Unit 00 is in Zeruel, Unit 06 is piloted by Kaworu. Are we going to have everyone look up and see Unit-08 Ex Machina arrive? A repaired and decontaminated Unit 03 maybe? Maybe to gauge the fandom interest in a potential movie/manga/whatever else covering the time skip events?

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by Raikyu » Mon Jan 16, 2023 5:00 pm Considering that Asuka, in that image, has shorter hair than usual and that improvised bardiel seal/eyepatch, I think that it will be set sometime after she recovers from the incident with Unit-03. It would be interesting to see a reimagining of NGE's Asuka fight against the MP Evas since we never saw them in the Rebuilds, but this time she will win xD. Another possibility is that they will show us the never seen 11th Angel.

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Mon Jan 16, 2023 5:31 pm Jinroh wrote: It's probably going to be a glorified clip with barely, if any dialogue. Maybe to gauge the fandom interest in a potential movie/manga/whatever else covering the time skip events?

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Mon Jan 16, 2023 6:15 pm nerv bae wrote: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by nerv bae » Mon Jan 16, 2023 6:31 pm Jayfive wrote: Youve got to wonder what Unit she is in if this is a flashback to just after the end of 2.0. Unit 01 is in god mode, Unit 02 is in bits, Unit 00 is in Zeruel, Unit 06 is piloted by Kaworu. Are we going to have everyone look up and see Unit-08 Ex Machina arrive? A repaired and decontaminated Unit 03 maybe?

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Jan 16, 2023 7:04 pm BernardoCairo wrote: It's probably some kind of special monitor, going by those red symbols on it (kind of makes me think about the Neo Nerv logo itself). A cloth monitor... Interesting idea.

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by AsuQa_PsyOp_Langley » Tue Jan 17, 2023 4:48 pm The red symbols remind me of those containment pillars SEELE/NERV/WILLE use and the one Asuka has inside her eye after the time skip (and more generally the esoteric engravings SEELE seems fond of, as noted, including the one in her medical coffin by the end of 2).

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by Szmitten » Tue Jan 17, 2023 7:32 pm The red symbols probably should be hex pilar symbology, but they don't seem to be. They're simpler and less dense. The two holographic displays in front of Asuka, I tried to read them in case it identifies anything interesting, but the largest word in the middle of both are just the word "ACTIVE". I also checked the clearer keyframes of Asuka's condition at the end of 2.0 to see if there were any similarities, and I guess Asuka being completely blindfolded instead of just having the eyepatch makes some sense since that was how she was with no indication otherwise, eyepatch in the preview notwithstanding.

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Tue Jan 17, 2023 8:27 pm Definitely not the hex symbols we all have come to know and love... looks like some sort of egyptian hyeroglyphs rendered into a more angular, computer display-friendly font? At first I thought maybe a digital rendering of the cuneiform seen in the Dead See Scrolls, but not really and Why would Asuka be presented with such text in the first place? I think it's maybe some sort of technical diagrams common in e.g. NERV HQ displays, just that they're rendered small enough (to fit in the visor) that we think of them as text...

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by nerv bae » Tue Jan 17, 2023 8:40 pm dedicating this reply to midori's mom (tentative name) What's written on her hat? "charmy"?

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by nerv bae » Tue Jan 17, 2023 8:56 pm DantesInferno wrote: Definitely not the hex symbols we all have come to know and love... looks like some sort of egyptian hyeroglyphs rendered into a more angular, computer display-friendly font? At first I thought maybe a digital rendering of the cuneiform seen in the Dead See Scrolls, but not really and Why would Asuka be presented with such text in the first place? I think it's maybe some sort of technical diagrams common in e.g. NERV HQ displays, just that they're rendered small enough (to fit in the visor) that we think of them as text...

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by DantesInferno » Tue Jan 17, 2023 9:32 pm nerv bae wrote: I went looking for Midori stuff and found some glyph stuff instead. Here are three frames from the activation of Shinji's DSS choker in 3.0: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by AsuQa_PsyOp_Langley » Tue Jan 17, 2023 10:37 pm I'd want to say that on that side of the blindfold it's not something appearing for the benefit of Asuka or that she could ever read but we see in that frame there's some entry plug hologram HUD in front of her... Post timeskip she obviously only "need" a eyepatch so I was assuming a complete blindfold is some stopgap solution perhaps because they didn't implant her a mini-pillar yet or something along those lines and/or that it's really early in her convalescence perhaps. The similarity to DSS collar tech suggests a limiter of some sort. That or perhaps it's an add-on device with a specific purpose (like part of a weapon system). Replying to a post in another thread: Konja7 wrote: It wouldn't be the first time that Shinji activated abilities of an Eva with his will alone, although he doesn't have full knowledge of what he's doing.

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by writer » Wed Jan 18, 2023 12:05 am It could be that the cloth is a quickly created defense against the angelic infection, suggesting that Asuka is loaded into whatever Eva this is to face something imminent (like an MP Eva attack or a 3I scenario). My prediction is that -46h will start with N3I being stopped, the fallout from that event, and the tale of how 3I came to be. Wouldn’t it be grand to end with 3I initiating, knowing there is possibility for a full on EoE 3I remake? Even better if we get it in -46h, but it feels like this is only one part of a series of minis that will take bits and pieces of what was removed from Rebuild and recreate them to expand the narrative. Anno’s touch will still be there, but the rest of the creative team will have full reign to expand as they deem fit, adding clarity or mystery to expand the vaguer pieces of the puzzle. Also, let’s hope for some juicy Mari scenes. I think she’s been mysterious long enough. I want solid details, and there is no better place for that than interrogation.

[]: Re: -46h (GENERAL)             Quote Post by Axx°N N. » Wed Jan 18, 2023 1:35 am nerv bae wrote: What's written on her hat? "charmy"?
